seo.title: Port Jervis NY Real Estate | Jin Pang
seo.description: Search homes for sale in Port Jervis, NY. Award-winning schools, luxury properties, NYC commuter-friendly. Median price $1.65M. Expert local guidance.

name: Port Jervis
tagline: Where Award-Winning Schools Meet Luxury Living
overview: Port Jervis is consistently ranked among the best places to live in New York State — and for good reason. This picturesque village combines world-class public schools, walkable downtown villages, and meticulously maintained homes on generous lots. The Metro-North Harlem Line delivers residents to Grand Central in under 35 minutes, making Port Jervis the pinnacle of Orange County family living.
